nasb.text: Those who forsake the law praise the wicked, But those who keep the law strive with them.

esv.text: Those who forsake the law praise the wicked, but those who keep the law strive against them.

cnv.text: 離棄律法的，稱讚惡人； 遵守律法的，卻與惡人相爭。

ccb.text: 背弃律法的称赞恶人， 遵守律法的抗拒恶人。

csbs.text: 离弃律法的，会称赞恶人； 遵守律法的，向恶人挑战。
